title: phyllanthus stenophyllus
intro: Phyllanthus stenophyllus, also known as small-leaved phyllanthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian and Southeast Asian medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus stenophyllus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney disorders, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
